setup.title: Configure run
setup.label_start_demand: Initial demand — % of VEJ target per boundary
setup.get_hint: Parameters are submitted via GET to {path}.

sections.warmup: Warmup — shadow prices (without aligning annual ECU VEJ target to ecumenge_ziel_J)

run_params.ecumenge_note_suffix: — ecumenge_J = simulated effective annual amount for the first ecumenge_T (÷12).

warmup.footnote: Only in the first N months (configuration price_elasticity_warmup_months): per boundary the step r_k relative to the previous month's price; no alignment of annual ECU VEJ target to the effective simulated annual target. Columns: monthly sum p·VET target, reference ecumenge_ziel_sim_J/12 (after ratchet if any), monthly deviation and annualized (12·Δ month).

yearly_ecu.footnote: Annual ECU VEJ target (bundle) = annual value Σ p_i·vej_ziel_i at the price vector at year end (account framework). In the “ECU accounts” chart the same quantity is also shown as a monthly share (÷12) alongside actual and reference lines. Slack = annual Σ p·VEJ target minus configured ecumenge_ziel_J — zero under exact normalization; on the soft path it may differ from 0 (gradual approach to simulated annual budget ecumenge_ziel_sim_J). Chart “ECU accounts”: ecumenge_ziel_sim_J (month) and ecumenge_T are separate curves (ecumenge_T = simulated monthly outflow for Σ p·c; may differ from the ratchet monthly share, e.g. in the first month). Mean util. = mean of VEJ-Ist / VET target per boundary (can be > 1).

charts.ecu_totals_caption: ECU accounts (all monthly): framework, booked, configured target, effective annual budget (ratchet), budget cap

boundaries.intro: Demand column = reference demand (demand_at_reference_price), same unit as VEJ-Ist / month. ECU VEJ-Ist column = p·VEJ-Ist at this boundary (booked ECU).
